Part.Source: Event Start &CreRecPag = 'P' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWFRETE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &parmFiLCod &FrtCod = &parmFrtCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &parmEmpCod.Visible = False &parmFilCod.Visible = False &parmFrtCod.Visible = False &varMode.Visible = False Grid2_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid2.InternalName Grid2.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'loadFrete' EndEvent Event Grid2.Load For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod Where FrtItmNot = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &grid2FrtPedCod = FrtPedCod &grid2FrtPedFiLCod = FrtPedFiLCod &grid2FrtNfeCod = FrtNfeCod &grid2FrtNfeFilCod = FrtNfeFilCod &grid2FrtItmCod = FrtItmCod &grid2FrtItmCte = FrtItmCte &grid2FrtItmVlrCal = FrtItmVlrCal &grid2FrtNfeNum = FrtNfeNum &grid2FrtItmTip = FrtItmTip &grid2FrtItmNot = FrtItmNot If &grid2FrtPedCod <> 0 &grid2Documento = 'PEDIDO' &grid2FiLCod = &grid2FrtPedFiLCod &grid2PedCod = &grid2FrtPedCod localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('P', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, &grid2PedCod, &grid2FrtNfeCod, &grid2FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &grid2PedCliCodRaz, &grid2Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &grid2NfePedCod, &grid2PedFilCod, &grid2NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) Else &grid2Documento = 'NOTA FISCAL' &grid2FiLCod = &grid2FrtNfeFilCod &grid2PedCod = &grid2FrtNfeNum localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('N', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, &grid2PedCod, &grid2FrtNfeCod, &grid2FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &grid2PedCliCodRaz, &grid2Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &grid2NfePedCod, &grid2PedFilCod, &grid2NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) EndIF if &IsgridErro = true or &IsErroTipFrt = true or &IsErroTraCod = true &grid2Status.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Else &grid2Status.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,40) If &grid2Status.IsEmpty() &grid2Status = &grid2Documento.Trim() + ' OK' EndIF EndIF &Varchar = &grid2FrtItmCte RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&Varchar, &Varchar) &CteNum = val(&Varchar) LocalizaCteConhecimento.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtTraCod, &CteNum, &grid2FrtItmNot, &grid2FrtItmVlrCal, &grid2CteStatus) if &grid2CteStatus.IsEmpty() &grid2CteStatus.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Else &grid2CteStatus.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,40) &grid2CteStatus = 'CTe OK' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &grid2RemoveNota = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Load EndFor EndEvent Event Grid.Load For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod Where FrtItmNot = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &FrtPedCod = FrtPedCod &FrtPedFiLCod = FrtPedFiLCod &FrtNfeCod = FrtNfeCod &FrtNfeNum = FrtNfeNum &FrtNfeFilCod = FrtNfeFilCod &FrtItmCod = FrtItmCod &grid1FrtItmCte = FrtItmCte &FrtItmVlrCal = FrtItmVlrCal &FrtItmTip = FrtItmTip &FrtItmNot = FrtItmNot If &FrtPedCod <> 0 &Documento = 'PEDIDO' &gridFiLCod = &FrtPedFiLCod &gridPedCod = &FrtPedCod localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('P', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, &gridPedCod, &FrtNfeCod, &FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &gridPedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &NfePedCod, &PedFilCod, &NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) Else &Documento = 'NOTA FISCAL' &gridFiLCod = &FrtNfeFilCod &gridPedCod = &FrtNfeNum localizaPedidoNotaFrete.Call('N', FrtItmNot, EmpCod, FrtPedFiLCod, FrtNfeFilCod, &gridPedCod, &FrtNfeCod, &FrtNfeNum, FrtTraCod, FrtItmCte, FrtItmTip, FrtDtaLct, &gridPedCliCodRaz, &Status, &IsgridErro, &IsErroTipFrt, &IsErroTraCod, &NfePedCod, &PedFilCod, &NfeCod, &CotObs, &CotVlr, &CotTraCodRaz, &CotNro, &IsErroJaLancado) EndIF if &IsgridErro = true or &IsErroTipFrt = true or &IsErroTraCod = true &Status.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Else &Status.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,40) If &Status.IsEmpty() &Status = &Documento.Trim() + ' OK' EndIF EndIF &Varchar = &grid1FrtItmCte RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&Varchar, &Varchar) &CteNum = val(&Varchar) LocalizaCteConhecimento.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtTraCod, &CteNum, &FrtItmNot, &FrtItmVlrCal, &CteStatus) if &CteStatus.IsEmpty() &CteStatus.ForeColor = RGB(255,100,0) Else &CteStatus.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,40) &CteStatus = 'CTe OK' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &RemoveNota = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Load EndFor EndEvent Event 'DoCancelar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWFrete.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoActionInsert' do 'GravaFrete' If &IsReturn = true wpFreteItem.Popup(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtCod) Refresh EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'CheckRequiredFields' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &FilCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Filial'), DVMessageType.error, &FilCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &FrtDtaEms.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Emissão'), DVMessageType.error, &FrtDtaEms.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &FrtDoc.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Documento'), DVMessageType.error, &FrtDoc.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &FrtDtaVct.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Vencimento'), DVMessageType.error, &FrtDtaVct.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &FrtTraCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Transp.'), DVMessageType.error, &FrtTraCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &FrtVlrCtb.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','R$ Total Notas'), DVMessageType.error, &FrtVlrCtb.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaCodigoPlanoContas.Call(&EmpCod, &FrtPlanCod, &AuxFrtPlanCod) if &AuxFrtPlanCod.IsEmpty() Msg('Plano de Contas é Obrigatório.') &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndiF EndSub Event Refresh If &FrtCod <> 0 do 'loadFrete' EndIF EndEvent Event &FrtVlrCtb.IsValid do 'TotalFrete' EndEvent Event &FrtAcrVlr.IsValid do 'TotalFrete' EndEvent Event &FrtDscVlr.IsValid do 'TotalFrete' EndEvent Event 'F4' 4 if &IsDesabilita = true and &FrtStsFin <> Status_Financeiro.FECHADO PromptTransportadora.Popup(&EmpCod, &FrtTraCod) &FrtTraCod.SetFocus() EndiF EndEvent Event &FrtPlanCod.IsValid RetornaCodigoPlanoContas.Call(&EmpCod, &FrtPlanCod, &AuxFrtPlanCod) EndEvent Event &FrtTraCod.IsValid do 'Transportadora' EndEvent Event Enter do 'GravaFrete' if &IsReturn = true If &varMode = 'INS' &PadObs = padL(trim(str(&FilCod)), 8, ' ') PadraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) NewwpFrete.Link('INS', &EmpCod, &FilCod, 0) Else wwFrete.Link() EndIF EndIF EndEvent Event &RemoveNota.Click do 'GravaFrete' If &IsReturn = true RemoveConhecimentoPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtCod, &FrtItmNot, &FrtItmCod, &FrtNfeFilCod, &FrtNfeCod, &FrtPedFiLCod, &FrtPedCod, &Context.UserName) Refresh EndiF EndEvent Event &grid2RemoveNota.Click do 'GravaFrete' If &IsReturn = true RemoveConhecimentoPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtCod, &grid2FrtItmNot, &grid2FrtItmCod, &grid2FrtNfeFilCod, &grid2FrtNfeCod, &grid2FrtPedFiLCod, &grid2FrtPedCod, &Context.UserName) Refresh EndiF EndEvent Sub 'TotalFrete' &FrtVlrTotFin = (&FrtVlrCtb + &FrtAcrVlr) - &FrtDscVlr EndSub Sub 'GravaFrete' Do 'CheckRequiredFields' &FrtDoc = &FrtDoc.Trim() If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True do 'Transportadora' if &IsErroTransportadora = false VerificaDocumentoFrete.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtDoc, &FrtCod, &FrtTraCod, &Mensagem) if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() GravaFrete.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtCod, &FrtDoc, &FrtTraCod, &FrtDtaEms, &FrtDtaEnt, &FrtObs, &FrtVlrCtb, &FrtDtaVct, &FrtDscVlr, &FrtAcrVlr, &AuxFrtPlanCod, &Context.UserName) RateiaFreteItens.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FrtCod) &IsReturn = true Else msg(&Mensagem) EndIF EndIF EndIF EndSub Sub 'loadFrete' &IsDesabilita = true For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where FrtCod = &FrtCod &FilCod.Enabled = 0 &FrtDoc = FrtDoc &FrtTraCod = FrtTraCod &FrtTraRaz = FrtTraRaz &FrtTraIs = FrtTraIs &FrtDtaEms = FrtDtaEms &FrtDtaVct = FrtDtaVct &FrtObs = FrtObs &FrtVlrCtb = FrtVlrCtb RetornaCodigoHierarquicoPlanoContas.call(EmpCod, FrtPlanCod, &FrtPlanCod) &FrtStsFin = FrtStsFin &FrtAcrVlr = FrtAcrVlr &FrtDscVlr = FrtDscVlr &FrtVlrTotFin = FrtVlrTotFin &TotalNotas = 0 &IsDesabilita = true For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod, FrtItmCod &TotalNotas += FrtItmVlrCal &IsDesabilita = false EndFor Exit When none &FilCod.Enabled = 1 &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FrtDtaEms = Serverdate() &FrtDtaEnt = &FrtDtaEms &FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &FilCod = val(substr(&PadObs, 1, 8)) EndIF EndFor &FrtTraCod.Enabled = &IsDesabilita if &FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO &FrtDtaVct.Enabled = 0 &FrtDoc.Enabled = 0 &FrtVlrCtb.enabled = 0 &FrtAcrVlr.Enabled = 0 &FrtDscVlr.Enabled = 0 EndIF EndSub Sub 'Transportadora' &IsErroTransportadora = true For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &FrtTraCod Where PesIsTra = true &FrtTraRaz = PesRaz &IsErroTransportadora = false Exit When None &FrtTraRaz = 'TRANSPORTADORA NÃO LOCALIZADA' msg(&FrtTraRaz) EndFor EndSub
